aeo_readiness.summary: AI assistants are unlikely to cite this business due to a lack of structured conversational content and authority signals. The current website focuses on traditional SEO but misses opportunities for AI-driven visibility.
quick_wins: Implement FAQPage schema with conversational Q&A content.
Add LocalBusiness schema to improve local AI recognition.

gbp_analysis.summary: The Google Business Profile is well-optimized but lacks depth in Q&A and recent posts.
critical_issues: No recent posts or updates on GBP.
Q&A section is inactive or missing engagement.

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is perfect with no issues detected.
action_items: Maintain current NAP consistency across all platforms.
Regularly monitor for any inconsistencies due to third-party changes.

schema_gaps: No HowTo schema for common HVAC issues
LocalBusiness schema lacks detailed service descriptions

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of conversational content and structured data for AI consumption.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Queries related to emergency HVAC services and local recommendations.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Implementing FAQPage schema with questions about emergency services.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Highlighting certifications, awards, and detailed case studies to establish expertise.

agency_pitch.hook: Unlock AI-driven leads by making your business the go-to HVAC expert in Hillsboro.
agency_pitch.pain_point: Without AI-ready content, you're missing out on 40% of potential leads from voice and AI search.
agency_pitch.proof_point: Competitors with structured data and conversational content rank higher in AI search results.
agency_pitch.solution: Our AEO approach integrates schema markup, conversational content, and authority signals to make your business stand out to AI models.
agency_pitch.impact_estimate: Expect a 30-40% increase in AI-driven leads within the first 3 months.
agency_pitch.urgency: AI adoption is accelerating; waiting means falling behind competitors who are already optimizing for AI.

email_subject_line: Unlock AI-Ready HVAC Leads in Hillsboro - Act Now!
opening_line: We analyzed your website and identified key opportunities to make your HVAC business stand out to AI search and voice assistants.
cta: Let's schedule a call to discuss how we can optimize your site for AI-driven growth.
